message:
test(ftui-runtime): improve resize_coalescer.rs test coverage for edge cases and API surface (bd-dionl)

Add 50 new tests covering DecisionEvidence API (favor_apply, favor_coalesce,
forced_deadline, is_strong/is_decisive boundaries, to_jsonl), edge cases
(hard_deadline=0, rate_window<2), json_escape special/control chars,
clear_logs, TelemetryHooks has_*/with_tracing, Regime::as_str,
DecisionSummary, screen_mode_str variants, config/coalescer builder chaining,
CoalesceAction equality, FNV hash determinism. Test count 57 → 107.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
